div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 41px; margin-left: 545px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #036897;
display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Verdana; color: light-dark(#036897, #5cb3dc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
